creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
SmartCVS is a powerfull graphical CVS client wrote in Java
        The application can be freelly used in the Fundation mode
        but options can be enabled in Professional mode (not free).
        By default, fresh installs come with a free 30 days period
        to test Professional options.

        The port was done with the aproval of syntevo, the smartCVS owner.
